---
title: 'PowerGS: Display-Rendering Power Co-Optimization for Neural Rendering in Power-Constrained
  XR Systems'
author:
- Weikai Lin
- Sushant Kondguli
- Carll Marshall
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
- human_perception
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3757377.3763851
talk_source: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1KPnwwdGmt3R7GD0XqN2uv4YG4kHaDgun/view
supp_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/sa25-powergs-supp.pdf
website_source: https://horizon-lab.org/powergs/
journ: SIGGRAPH Asia
year: 2025
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 99
---
